case_title: VOROUS EDWARD F. DBA DUSTBUSTERZ VS JENSSEN NORMAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $570.00 FILED BY VOROUS EDWARD F. DBA DUSTBUSTERZ AS TO DEFENDANT JENSSEN NORMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-08-1992, GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JENSSEN NORMAN
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT JENSSEN NORMAN HEARING SET FOR SEP-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOROUS EDWARD F. DBA DUSTBUSTERZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JENSSEN NORMAN $570.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $599.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOROUS EDWARD F. DBA DUSTBUSTERZ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JENSSEN NORMAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
